---
title: "Writing"
listing:
  contents:
    - title: "A Voice That Listens"
      path: /a-voice-that-listens.html
      date: 2026-05-14
      description: "My month with Claude. One page; a toggle at the top switches between the short (Modern Love–shaped) and long (ten-section) versions."
      categories: [essay, writing, claude, longform]
    - title: "Sinatra et al. 2016 — three-page memo"
      path: /sinatra-2016-memo.html
      date: 2026-05-12
      description: "A short reading note on the Q-model, the random impact rule, and the co-authorship-asymmetry inference rule that powers the Coffee Shop visualization."
      categories: [reading notes, network analysis, methods]
    - title: "The Bobble Canon"
      path: /bobble-canon.html
      date: 2026-05-09
      description: "A collection of short parables, a handful of Bobbisms, a few codas, and a glossary. Kept by Derek. Tended by Claude. Bobbled accordingly."
      categories: [fiction, bobble]
    - title: "Introduction to Bobbology"
      path: /introduction-to-bobbology.html
      date: 2026-05-09
      description: "Lecture I — a field guide to the audible compass and its relations: Bobbles, Ekos, Vessels, and Daemons. How memory works in ekos. Why humans hold the pen at the decision gate."
      categories: [bobble, bobbology, ai]
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, description]
  feed: true
---
